title: dev.generate_code action payload
description: Structured code-change proposal for the dev.generate_code action type. Schema validation gates execution mechanics, not intent safety — a structurally valid diff may still contain malicious content.

diff_entries.description: Ordered list of file changes. Must not exceed 50 entries.

file_path.description: Relative path within the workspace root. Stored as-is (not NFC-normalized) for filesystem operations.

content.description: New file content for create/modify operations. Empty string for delete.

diff_identity_hash.description: canonical_hash of the structured diff (sorted by file_path). Used for structural consensus and replay verification. Separate from proposal_hash.

proposal_hash.description: SHA-256 of the normalized proposal_text (Layer 1 field, carried for audit correlation).

workspace_root.description: realpath()-resolved workspace root directory captured at construction time.
